overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character navigating through the Gryffindor common room and dormitory tower. The character walks through gothic corridors, enters a dormitory to change from school robes to pajamas, and returns to the common room while following other students. The environment features warm firelight, red tapestries, stone staircases, and medieval wooden furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with fireplace and seating areas

events.description: approaching and passing through stone archway exit from common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room toward the exit archway, passing seated students

notable_agents.action: student sitting in armchair reading near the fireplace

gothic stone archway serving as room exit
large terrestrial globe on wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the warm, firelit Gryffindor common room, passing students relaxing in leather armchairs. The camera moves toward a stone archway exit, with red tapestries and a large fireplace visible on the left side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with wooden paneling and grand staircase

events.description: exits common room into narrow stone corridor with wooden paneling
begins ascending wide stone staircase with wooden railings

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase and walking through gothic corridors

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with carved wooden banisters
dark oak wall panels with vertical grooves
portrait in ornate gilded frame hanging on wall
full suit of medieval armor standing in alcove

segments.scene_description: Having left the common room, the character enters a narrow stone corridor and begins ascending a grand staircase. The walls feature dark wooden paneling and oil paintings, with suits of armor standing in alcoves along the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dormitory room with four-poster beds

events.description: enters wooden door into the round dormitory bedroom
interacts with wardrobe to change from school robes into pajamas

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory and changing clothes at the wooden wardrobe

tall dark wood wardrobe with brass handles
vertical red house banner with gold embroidery
low wooden chest of drawers with pottery on top

segments.scene_description: The character enters a circular dormitory room with stone walls and wooden floors, containing four-poster beds and a large wardrobe. The character approaches the wardrobe and changes from school robes into nightclothes.

events.description: exits dormitory room back into stone corridor
joins group of students ascending spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: following other students up the spiral staircase while wearing pajamas

notable_agents.action: student in nightclothes walking up stairs ahead of ego

entered.detail: narrow winding stone staircase with steep steps
tall arched window with stone tracery showing night sky
wooden bulletin board with papers pinned to it

segments.scene_description: Now in pajamas, the character exits the dormitory and joins other students climbing a narrow spiral staircase. The stone corridors feature gothic windows and suits of armor, with the group moving together toward the upper levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase descending toward common room

events.description: re-enters the common room through the stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking down the grand staircase and through corridors back to the common room

notable_agents.action: student in pajamas walking down stairs alongside ego

entered.detail: painting of a bearded man in gilded oval frame
large stone fireplace with active fire

segments.scene_description: The character descends the grand staircase alongside other students, passing portraits and wooden paneling. The group re-enters the common room, with the large fireplace becoming visible again in the warm, firelit space.

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room toward the fireplace area

notable_agents.action: student sitting in armchair relaxing near the fire

entered.detail: long brown leather couch with button tufting
large wall tapestry depicting a medieval scene
tall bookshelf filled with leather-bound volumes

segments.scene_description: Back in the common room, the character walks past students relaxing on leather sofas and armchairs. The camera approaches the large central fireplace, passing bookshelves and hanging tapestries in the warm, firelit circular room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the cozy, communal warmth of the Gryffindor common room into the private seclusion of a student dormitory. It begins by gliding through the firelit lounge past students in leather armchairs, moving toward a stone archway flanked by red tapestries. As the character exits the room, the scene shifts into a narrow stone corridor where the camera ascends a grand staircase lined with dark wooden paneling, oil paintings, and suits of armor. The movement then leads directly into a circular dormitory characterized by stone walls and wooden floors, finally coming to a halt as the character approaches a large wardrobe to change from school robes into nightclothes.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the narrow, gothic heights of the dormitory tower down into the expansive warmth of the Gryffindor common room. It begins with the character in pajamas, joining a group of students as they ascend a stone spiral staircase lined with suits of armor and gothic windows. As the group turns and descends a grand staircase, the environment shifts from cold stone corridors to areas adorned with wooden paneling and portraits. The scene then opens into the circular common room, where the camera glides past students relaxing on leather sofas and armchairs. Finally, the movement leads deeper into the firelit space, passing bookshelves and hanging tapestries before approaching the glow of the large central fireplace.
